subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Upon thee be the glory of God and His loving-kindness. The letter which was sent to His Name, upon him be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله علیک بهاء الله و عنایته نامه که بجناب اسم الله علیه بهائی ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
